title: phalangium humile
intro: Phalangium humile, commonly known as Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal and culinary properties, providing several health benefits such as antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which may help to soothe minor cuts and scrapes, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The therapeutic actions of Phalangium humile include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-anxiety, and sedative effects, making it a popular choice for aromatherapy and stress relief. The bioactive constituents of this plant include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties and make it a valuable addition to herbal remedies.
